name: bexa
displayName: Bexa — Frontend Design Skills for AI Agents
description: Drop one SKILL.md file. Your AI agent stops building generic UIs and starts producing professional, non-generic frontends.
author: BekhruzTursunboev

skills.name: bexa
skills.description: The default skill. Use for any website, landing page, or SaaS product. Covers typography, color, layout, motion, and component standards.

skills.name: bexa-dashboard
skills.description: For SaaS admin panels and analytics UIs. Data visualization standards, command palette, KPI layouts, high-density information architecture.

skills.name: bexa-mobile
skills.description: For React Native and Expo apps. Thumb zone architecture, gesture physics, haptic feedback, iOS and Android motion patterns.

skills.name: bexa-motion
skills.description: Add-on for cinematic animation. GSAP scrolltelling, Three.js WebGL, Framer Motion physics, named spring configurations.
